Azure OpenAI REST API Reference

Page last updated: 2026-03-21

API Versions:
- Control Plane Latest GA: 2025-06-01
- Control Plane Latest Preview: 2025-07-01-preview
- Data Plane GA: 2024-10-21
- Data Plane Preview: v1 preview

Core Endpoints:
- Chat Completions: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/chat/completions (streaming, tool calling, parallel execution, log probs, JSON mode, structured outputs, vision)
- Completions: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/completions
- Embeddings: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/embeddings (configurable dimensions, float/base64 encoding)
- Audio Transcriptions: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/audio/transcriptions (multiple formats: json, verbose_json, text, vtt, srt)
- Audio Translations: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/audio/translations
- Image Generation: POST /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/images/generations (DALL-E, quality standard/hd, style vivid/natural)

Chat Extensions (On Your Data):
- Azure Search (vector, semantic, hybrid query types, field mapping, strictness)
- Azure Cosmos DB (MongoDB vCore, vector search, embedding dependency)

Authentication: API Key (api-key header), Microsoft Entra ID (Bearer token)

Content Filtering: Sexual, Violence, Hate, Self-harm, Profanity, Jailbreak, Protected material (text/code)

Advanced Features: Parallel tool calls, Structured outputs (JSON Schema), Seed parameter (Beta), Log probabilities, Response streaming (SSE)

Updated: 2026-03-30
